stemHtml: Select the correct statement about the European Satellite Based Augmentation System, EGNOS:

options.a: EGNOS uses at least 1 geostationary satellite to transmit integrity and safety related messages to aircraft.
options.b: EGNOS uses up to 2 geostationary satellites to transmit ranging signals in the L2 frequency.
options.c: EGNOS uses at least 3 geostationary satellites to transmit receiver clock error and integrity data.
options.d: EGNOS uses up to 4 geostationary satellites to transmit integrity data and ranging signals to aircraft.
